claims.conversation: User: "Hi, I parked my car at the supermarket and someone backed into my side panel. Now there is a massive dent and scratch right over the rear wheel fender." Agent: "Can you send photo?" User: "Yes, sending car_dent.jpg now."
claims.user_history: Loyal customer, 2 past claims in 5 years, low risk.

claims.conversation: User: "My laptop fell off the kitchen counter. When I opened it, the screen has bright colorful vertical bars and shattered line cracks all over it." Agent: "Is the keyboard working?" User: "Yes, but the screen panel is entirely ruined. Attached laptop_crack.jpg."
claims.user_history: Claimed 4 screens in the last 12 months. Suspicious activity flag.

claims.conversation: User: "The parcel was left in the rain. The outer carton Box is entirely soaked and torn at the sides, tape came off, and the box is crushed open, exposing contents." Agent: "Is the inside item safe?" User: "No, package_torn.jpg clearly shows torn bubble mailer inside too."
